employee_questionnaire.question_text: I feel energized when I start my workday.
I feel in control of how I manage my tasks.
I find it difficult to disconnect from work after office hours.

strengths.description: Displays strong enthusiasm and positive energy towards work, especially at the start of tasks.
Demonstrates a strong sense of ownership and control over daily responsibilities.

weaknesses.description: May experience difficulty in regulating workload intensity during high engagement phases.

opportunities.description: Has the potential to build stronger self-regulation and reflective habits early in the role.

threats.description: Sustained high intensity without recovery periods may lead to fatigue or burnout.

recommended_actions.recommendation: Introduce intentional pauses and task prioritization to maintain sustainable energy levels.
Adopt a weekly self-reflection routine to assess workload, energy, and emotional state.
Channel high motivation into focused skill-building initiatives aligned with career goals.
